text.title: Screen Reader Test Script Templates Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Are device + OS + SR + version all pinned?

branch.question: Is every step explicit (gesture + expected + criterion)?

text.example: Concrete walk: Signup VoiceOver script (iOS 17.4) with right-flick + expected 'Email, edit text' + contains-match criterion + SC 1.3.1 mapping → archive.
